source: live Supabase introspection (information_schema) via Supabase MCP. Refreshed 2026-07-23: applied the billing_and_subscriptions migration (billing_customers, subscriptions, invoices, seat_sync_queue tables; team_members.is_billable_seat column) for Stripe subscription billing, then dropped the broken player_payments table (0 live rows, write path referenced columns that never existed on the table -- see docs/payments_billing_and_data_retention_proposal.md §6). Table-level set now 204 base tables (was 201), 7 views (unchanged).
